Crisis_In_Agriculture_Project2026

Vladimir Bountovski, Oscar Robert Nixon, Aske Høj Andersen and Mathias Hemls-Nielsen

2026-05-25

# SETUP ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Install required packages
library(tidyverse)
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.2.1     ✔ readr     2.2.0
## ✔ forcats   1.0.1     ✔ stringr   1.6.0
## ✔ ggplot2   4.0.3     ✔ tibble    3.3.1
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.5     ✔ tidyr     1.3.2
## ✔ purrr     1.2.2     
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
library(readr)

# IMPORT DATASET ---------------------------------------------------------

tiende_bog <- read_csv("tiende_bog.xlsx - Tiendedata.csv")
## Rows: 195 Columns: 21
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr (12): Person, Sted, Hvede, Rug, Byg, Havre, Ærter & Vikker, Bønner, Tien...
## dbl  (9): År, Føl, Lam, Gris, Kalv, Tiende Gris, Restance Lam, Restance Gris...
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
# DATA CLEANING -----------------------------------------------------------

# Remove spaces in location column 
tiende_bog$Sted <- trimws(tiende_bog$Sted)

# Correct translation /spelling inconsitency in location names:
# "Affuilltørp husfolk" samles med "Affuiltorp husfolk"
tiende_bog$Sted[
  tiende_bog$Sted == "Affuilltørp husfolk"
] <- "Affuiltorp husfolk"

# DATA CHECK ----------------------------------------------------------------

table(tiende_bog$Sted)
## 
##          Affuiltorp  Affuiltorp husfolk          Skalckenes Skalckenes husfolck 
##                  99                  36                  36                  24
# View(tiende_bog)

summary(tiende_bog)
##        Person           Sted           År             Hvede            Rug     
##  Length   :195   Length   :195   Min.   :1618   Length   :195   Length   :195  
##  N.unique : 25   N.unique :  4   1st Qu.:1621   N.unique : 34   N.unique : 27  
##  N.blank  :  0   N.blank  :  0   Median :1623   N.blank  :  0   N.blank  :  0  
##  Min.nchar:  9   Min.nchar: 10   Mean   :1623   Min.nchar:  3   Min.nchar:  3  
##  Max.nchar: 18   Max.nchar: 19   3rd Qu.:1626   Max.nchar:  9   Max.nchar:  9  
##                                  Max.   :1629   NAs      : 77   NAs      : 69  
##                                                                                
##         Byg            Havre       Ærter & Vikker       Bønner   
##  Length   :195   Length   :195   Length   :195    Length   :195  
##  N.unique : 53   N.unique : 24   N.unique : 21    N.unique : 10  
##  N.blank  :  0   N.blank  :  0   N.blank  :  0    N.blank  :  0  
##  Min.nchar:  3   Min.nchar:  3   Min.nchar:  3    Min.nchar:  3  
##  Max.nchar:  9   Max.nchar:  9   Max.nchar: 10    Max.nchar:  4  
##  NAs      : 47   NAs      : 66   NAs      : 73    NAs      :134  
##                                                                  
##       Føl             Lam              Gris             Kalv      
##  Min.   :1.000   Min.   : 1.000   Min.   : 2.000   Min.   :1.000  
##  1st Qu.:1.000   1st Qu.: 6.000   1st Qu.: 4.000   1st Qu.:1.000  
##  Median :1.000   Median : 8.000   Median : 6.000   Median :2.000  
##  Mean   :1.383   Mean   : 9.365   Mean   : 6.867   Mean   :2.302  
##  3rd Qu.:2.000   3rd Qu.:11.000   3rd Qu.:10.000   3rd Qu.:3.000  
##  Max.   :3.000   Max.   :28.000   Max.   :16.000   Max.   :8.000  
##  NAs    :148     NAs    :32       NAs    :60       NAs    :89     
##      Tiende Lam   Tiende Gris     Restance Lam   Restance Gris        Gæs      
##  Length   :195   Min.   :1.000   Min.   :1.000   Min.   :1.000   Min.   :1.00  
##  N.unique :  4   1st Qu.:1.000   1st Qu.:3.000   1st Qu.:3.250   1st Qu.:2.00  
##  N.blank  :  0   Median :1.000   Median :4.000   Median :6.000   Median :2.00  
##  Min.nchar:  1   Mean   :1.153   Mean   :4.627   Mean   :5.273   Mean   :1.76  
##  Max.nchar:  5   3rd Qu.:1.000   3rd Qu.:6.000   3rd Qu.:7.000   3rd Qu.:2.00  
##  NAs      : 53   Max.   :3.000   Max.   :9.000   Max.   :9.000   Max.   :2.00  
##                  NAs    :110     NAs    :53      NAs    :173     NAs    :41    
##     Almisse Korn   Michelsdag Rug       Noter    
##  Length   :195   Length   :195    Length   :195  
##  N.unique :  4   N.unique :  2    N.unique : 26  
##  N.blank  :  0   N.blank  :  0    N.blank  :  0  
##  Min.nchar:  3   Min.nchar:  3    Min.nchar:  4  
##  Max.nchar:  4   Max.nchar:  4    Max.nchar:174  
##  NAs      : 85   NAs      : 81    NAs      :149  
## 
colnames(tiende_bog)
##  [1] "Person"         "Sted"           "År"             "Hvede"         
##  [5] "Rug"            "Byg"            "Havre"          "Ærter & Vikker"
##  [9] "Bønner"         "Føl"            "Lam"            "Gris"          
## [13] "Kalv"           "Tiende Lam"     "Tiende Gris"    "Restance Lam"  
## [17] "Restance Gris"  "Gæs"            "Almisse Korn"   "Michelsdag Rug"
## [21] "Noter"
str(tiende_bog)
## spc_tbl_ [195 × 21] (S3: spec_tbl_df/tbl_df/tbl/data.frame)
##  $ Person        : chr [1:195] "Lasse Mortenßen" "Lasse Mortenßen" "Frederich Hanßen" "Frederich Hanßen" ...
##  $ Sted          : chr [1:195] "Affuiltorp" "Affuiltorp" "Affuiltorp" "Affuiltorp" ...
##  $ År            : num [1:195] 1618 1619 1620 1621 1622 ...
##  $ Hvede         : chr [1:195] NA "8 k" NA "1 t" ...
##  $ Rug           : chr [1:195] NA "16 k" NA "1 t" ...
##  $ Byg           : chr [1:195] "1 td" "3 t" "3 t" "1 t 3 k" ...
##  $ Havre         : chr [1:195] "1 td" "10 k" "12 k" "12 k" ...
##  $ Ærter & Vikker: chr [1:195] "2 s" "1 l" "2 l" "2 l" ...
##  $ Bønner        : chr [1:195] NA NA NA NA ...
##  $ Føl           : num [1:195] 2 NA 1 NA NA 1 1 NA 2 3 ...
##  $ Lam           : num [1:195] 28 16 18 25 NA 21 8 2 10 8 ...
##  $ Gris          : num [1:195] NA NA 15 13 10 5 15 7 10 10 ...
##  $ Kalv          : num [1:195] 6 2 NA 8 1 6 5 5 5 5 ...
##  $ Tiende Lam    : chr [1:195] "3" "1" "1" "2" ...
##  $ Tiende Gris   : num [1:195] 1 NA 2 3 1 1 1 1 1 1 ...
##  $ Restance Lam  : num [1:195] 6 9 4 NA NA 3 NA 3 NA NA ...
##  $ Restance Gris : num [1:195] NA NA NA NA NA NA 2 NA NA 6 ...
##  $ Gæs           : num [1:195] 2 2 2 2 2 2 2 2 2 2 ...
##  $ Almisse Korn  : chr [1:195] "1 td" "1 td" "1 td" "1 td" ...
##  $ Michelsdag Rug: chr [1:195] "1 s" "1 s" NA NA ...
##  $ Noter         : chr [1:195] "[pag. 52-53]" NA "rugen quiterit vdj erterne" NA ...
##  - attr(*, "spec")=
##   .. cols(
##   ..   Person = col_character(),
##   ..   Sted = col_character(),
##   ..   År = col_double(),
##   ..   Hvede = col_character(),
##   ..   Rug = col_character(),
##   ..   Byg = col_character(),
##   ..   Havre = col_character(),
##   ..   `Ærter & Vikker` = col_character(),
##   ..   Bønner = col_character(),
##   ..   Føl = col_double(),
##   ..   Lam = col_double(),
##   ..   Gris = col_double(),
##   ..   Kalv = col_double(),
##   ..   `Tiende Lam` = col_character(),
##   ..   `Tiende Gris` = col_double(),
##   ..   `Restance Lam` = col_double(),
##   ..   `Restance Gris` = col_double(),
##   ..   Gæs = col_double(),
##   ..   `Almisse Korn` = col_character(),
##   ..   `Michelsdag Rug` = col_character(),
##   ..   Noter = col_character()

##  - attr(*, "problems")=<pointer: 0x7f975c534f00>
# FIGURE 1 - GRAIN PRODUCTION -------------------------------------------------

# PREPARING OF FIGURE 1 (DEVELOPMENT IN GRAIN PRODUCTION)
# Explore and examine the data in order to understand and clean it before use.

unique(tiende_bog$Hvede)
##  [1] NA          "8 k"       "1 t"       "2 t"       "11 k"      "1 t 12 k" 
##  [7] "14 k"      "2 t 1 k"   "2.5 t"     "1 t 8 k"   "30 k"      "10 k"     
## [13] "6 k"       "24 k"      "38 k"      "2 k"       "17 k"      "0.5 t"    
## [19] "12 k"      "18 k"      "1.5 t"     "7 k"       "2 s erter" "9 k"      
## [25] "1 k"       "22 k"      "4 k"       "3 k"       "5 k"       "16 k"     
## [31] "1 t 1 k"   "1 t 16 k"  "19 k"      "15 k"      "1 t 9 k"
unique(tiende_bog$Rug)
##  [1] NA          "16 k"      "1 t"       "1 t 4 k"   "19 k"      "2 t 3 k"  
##  [7] "24 k"      "1.5 t"     "12 k"      "14 k"      "8 k"       "5 k"      
## [13] "10 k"      "4 k"       "13 k"      "1 t 12 k"  "6 k"       "2 k"      
## [19] "9 k"       "7 k"       "11 k"      "15 k"      "3 k"       "1 k"      
## [25] "0.5 t"     "18 k"      "0.5 t 8 k" "24 β"
unique(tiende_bog$Byg)
##  [1] "1 td"      "3 t"       "1 t 3 k"   NA          "3.5 t"     "2 t 13 k" 
##  [7] "4 t 4 k"   "5 t"       "4 t"       "4.5 t 3 k" "1 t 14 k"  "2 t 4 k"  
## [13] "3 t 6 k"   "2 t"       "1 t 16 k"  "1.5 t 6 k" "2.5 t"     "2 t 15 k" 
## [19] "1 t 18 k"  "1.5 t"     "3 t 2 k"   "1 t 2 k"   "1 t 4 k"   "1 t"      
## [25] "1 t 12 k"  "36 k"      "1 t 5 k"   "1 t 9 k"   "1 t 11 k"  "11 k"     
## [31] "8 k"       "12 k"      "7 k"       "6 k"       "10 k"      "4 k"      
## [37] "18 k"      "16 k"      "1 t 13 k"  "1 t 8 k"   "1 t 7 k"   "24 k"     
## [43] "1 t 6 k"   "31 k"      "1 1/2 t"   "4 k 1 t"   "23 k"      "2 t 5 k"  
## [49] "1 t 19 k"  "22 k"      "9 k"       "5 k"       "14 k"      "1 s"
unique(tiende_bog$Havre)
##  [1] "1 td"      "10 k"      "12 k"      NA          "11 k"      "2 t 4 k"  
##  [7] "16 k"      "1.5 t 3 k" "14 k"      "17 k"      "8 k"       "1 t"      
## [13] "7 k"       "1 s"       "0.5 t"     "6 k"       "18 k"      "1.5 t"    
## [19] "4 k"       "5 k"       "3 k"       "2 k"       "9 k"       "13 k"     
## [25] "1 k"
# Data cleaning and processing to make the dataset easier to work with. 
# Due to the historical measurement system, values are converted into a common unit.

tiende_bog <- tiende_bog %>%
  mutate(
    Hvede_t = case_when(
      Hvede == "1 t" ~ 1,
      Hvede == "2 t" ~ 2,
      Hvede == "0.5 t" ~ 0.5,
      Hvede == "8 k" ~ 8/20,
      Hvede == "11 k" ~ 11/20,
      Hvede == "14 k" ~ 14/20,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    Rug_t = case_when(
      Rug == "1 t" ~ 1,
      Rug == "1.5 t" ~ 1.5,
      Rug == "0.5 t" ~ 0.5,
      Rug == "16 k" ~ 16/20,
      Rug == "19 k" ~ 19/20,
      Rug == "24 k" ~ 24/20,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ), 
    Byg_t = case_when(
      Byg == "1 t" ~ 1,
      Byg == "3 t" ~ 3,
      Byg == "1.5 t" ~ 1.5,
      Byg == "16 k" ~ 16/20,
      Byg == "19 k" ~ 19/20,
      Byg == "24 k" ~ 24/20,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    Havre_t = case_when(
      Havre == "1 t" ~ 1,
      Havre == "2 t" ~ 2,
      Havre == "0.5 t" ~ 0.5,
      Havre == "8 k" ~ 8/20,
      Havre == "11 k" ~ 11/20,
      Havre == "14 k" ~ 14/20,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
  )
    
# FIGURE 1: Development in production over time (GGPLOT)

# HVEDE

hvede_aar <- tiende_bog %>%
  group_by(År) %>%
  summarise(
    hvede = sum(Hvede_t, na.rm = TRUE)
  )


# View(hvede_aar)

ggplot(hvede_aar, aes(x = År, y = hvede)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Udvikling i hvedeproduktion over tid",
    x = "År",
    y = "Hvede (tønder)"
  )

# RUG

rug_aar <- tiende_bog %>%
  group_by(År) %>%
  summarise(
    rug = sum(Rug_t, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# View(rug_aar)

ggplot(rug_aar, aes(x = År, y = rug)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Udvikling i rugproduktion over tid",
    x = "År",
    y = "Rug (tønder)"
  )

# BYG

byg_aar <- tiende_bog %>%
  group_by(År) %>%
  summarise(
    byg = sum(Byg_t, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# View(byg_aar)

ggplot(byg_aar, aes(x = År, y = byg)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Udvikling i bygproduktion over tid",
    x = "År",
    y = "Byg (tønder)"
  )

# HAVRE

havre_aar <- tiende_bog %>%
  group_by(År) %>%
  summarise(
    havre = sum(Havre_t, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# View(havre_aar)

ggplot(havre_aar, aes(x = År, y = havre)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Udvikling i havreproduktion over tid",
    x = "År",
    y = "Havre (tønder)"
  )

# COMBINED FOR FIGURE 1

samlet_aar <- hvede_aar %>%
  left_join(rug_aar, by = "År") %>%
  left_join(byg_aar, by = "År") %>%
  left_join(havre_aar, by = "År")

ggplot(samlet_aar, aes(x = År)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = hvede, colour = "Hvede")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rug, colour = "Rug")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = byg, colour = "Byg")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = havre, colour = "Havre")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(1618, 1629, 1)
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c(
      "Hvede" = "gold",
      "Rug" = "darkgreen",
      "Byg" = "red",
      "Havre" = "blue"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Udvikling i kornproduktion over tid",
    x = "År",
    y = "Trave",
    colour = "Kornsort"
  )

# FIGURE 2 – DEVELOPMENT BY LOCATION ---------------------------------------

# PREPARATION OF FIGURE 2
# Locations over time, including production and payments.

sted_tid <- tiende_bog %>%
  group_by(År, Sted) %>%
  summarise(
    samlet =
      sum(Hvede_t, na.rm = TRUE) +
      sum(Rug_t, na.rm = TRUE) +
      sum(Byg_t, na.rm = TRUE) +
      sum(Havre_t, na.rm = TRUE) +
      sum(Lam, na.rm = TRUE) +
      sum(Gris, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
## `summarise()` has regrouped the output.
## ℹ Summaries were computed grouped by År and Sted.
## ℹ Output is grouped by År.
## ℹ Use `summarise(.groups = "drop_last")` to silence this message.
## ℹ Use `summarise(.by = c(År, Sted))` for per-operation grouping
##   (`?dplyr::dplyr_by`) instead.
#GGPLOT FOR FIGURE 2

ggplot(
  sted_tid,
  aes(
    x = År,
    y = samlet,
    colour = Sted
  )
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(1618, 1629, 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Udvikling i tiendeproduktion fordelt på sted",
    x = "År",
    y = "Samlet produktion og betaling",
    colour = "Sted"
  )

# BAR CHART 1 – LIVESTOCK DEVELOPMENT---------------------------------------

# Load dataset
tiende_bog <- read_csv("tiende_bog.xlsx - Tiendedata.csv")
## Rows: 195 Columns: 21
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr (12): Person, Sted, Hvede, Rug, Byg, Havre, Ærter & Vikker, Bønner, Tien...
## dbl  (9): År, Føl, Lam, Gris, Kalv, Tiende Gris, Restance Lam, Restance Gris...
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
# Reshape data to long format
data_long <- pivot_longer(
  tiende_bog,
  cols = c("Lam", "Gris", "Kalv"),
  names_to = "dyr",
  values_to = "antal"
)

# Remove NA and zero values
data_long <- data_long[!is.na(data_long$antal), ]

# Summarise livestock numbers by year and animal type
data_sum <- data_long %>%
  group_by(År, dyr) %>%
  summarise(antal = sum(antal), .groups = "drop")

# Create bar chart
ggplot(data_sum, aes(x = År, y = antal, fill = dyr)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(data_sum$År)) +
  labs(
    x = "År",
    y = "Samlet antal",
    fill = "Dyretype"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# BAR CHART 2 ---------------------------------------------------------------
library(tidyverse)

# Check data structure and value formats
str(tiende_bog)
## spc_tbl_ [195 × 21] (S3: spec_tbl_df/tbl_df/tbl/data.frame)
##  $ Person        : chr [1:195] "Lasse Mortenßen" "Lasse Mortenßen" "Frederich Hanßen" "Frederich Hanßen" ...
##  $ Sted          : chr [1:195] "Affuiltorp" "Affuiltorp" "Affuiltorp" "Affuiltorp" ...
##  $ År            : num [1:195] 1618 1619 1620 1621 1622 ...
##  $ Hvede         : chr [1:195] NA "8 k" NA "1 t" ...
##  $ Rug           : chr [1:195] NA "16 k" NA "1 t" ...
##  $ Byg           : chr [1:195] "1 td" "3 t" "3 t" "1 t 3 k" ...
##  $ Havre         : chr [1:195] "1 td" "10 k" "12 k" "12 k" ...
##  $ Ærter & Vikker: chr [1:195] "2 s" "1 l" "2 l" "2 l" ...
##  $ Bønner        : chr [1:195] NA NA NA NA ...
##  $ Føl           : num [1:195] 2 NA 1 NA NA 1 1 NA 2 3 ...
##  $ Lam           : num [1:195] 28 16 18 25 NA 21 8 2 10 8 ...
##  $ Gris          : num [1:195] NA NA 15 13 10 5 15 7 10 10 ...
##  $ Kalv          : num [1:195] 6 2 NA 8 1 6 5 5 5 5 ...
##  $ Tiende Lam    : chr [1:195] "3" "1" "1" "2" ...
##  $ Tiende Gris   : num [1:195] 1 NA 2 3 1 1 1 1 1 1 ...
##  $ Restance Lam  : num [1:195] 6 9 4 NA NA 3 NA 3 NA NA ...
##  $ Restance Gris : num [1:195] NA NA NA NA NA NA 2 NA NA 6 ...
##  $ Gæs           : num [1:195] 2 2 2 2 2 2 2 2 2 2 ...
##  $ Almisse Korn  : chr [1:195] "1 td" "1 td" "1 td" "1 td" ...
##  $ Michelsdag Rug: chr [1:195] "1 s" "1 s" NA NA ...
##  $ Noter         : chr [1:195] "[pag. 52-53]" NA "rugen quiterit vdj erterne" NA ...
##  - attr(*, "spec")=
##   .. cols(
##   ..   Person = col_character(),
##   ..   Sted = col_character(),
##   ..   År = col_double(),
##   ..   Hvede = col_character(),
##   ..   Rug = col_character(),
##   ..   Byg = col_character(),
##   ..   Havre = col_character(),
##   ..   `Ærter & Vikker` = col_character(),
##   ..   Bønner = col_character(),
##   ..   Føl = col_double(),
##   ..   Lam = col_double(),
##   ..   Gris = col_double(),
##   ..   Kalv = col_double(),
##   ..   `Tiende Lam` = col_character(),
##   ..   `Tiende Gris` = col_double(),
##   ..   `Restance Lam` = col_double(),
##   ..   `Restance Gris` = col_double(),
##   ..   Gæs = col_double(),
##   ..   `Almisse Korn` = col_character(),
##   ..   `Michelsdag Rug` = col_character(),
##   ..   Noter = col_character()
##   .. )
##  - attr(*, "problems")=<pointer: 0x7f975f0e3530>
# Clean text values
tiende_bog$`Tiende Lam` <- as.numeric(
  gsub(",", ".", tiende_bog$`Tiende Lam`)
)
## Warning: NAs introduced by coercion
# Reshape data to long format
data_long <- pivot_longer(
  tiende_bog,
  cols = c("Tiende Lam", "Tiende Gris"),
  names_to = "dyr",
  values_to = "antal"
)

# Remove NA and zero values
data_long <- data_long[!is.na(data_long$antal), ]

# Summarise livestock counts by year and animal type
data_sum <- data_long %>%
  group_by(År, dyr) %>%
  summarise(antal = sum(antal), .groups = "drop")

# Create bar chart
ggplot(data_sum, aes(x = År, y = antal, fill = dyr)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(data_long$År)) +
  labs(
    x = "År",
    y = "Samlet antal",
    fill = "Dyretype"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# BAR CHART 3 ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Reshape data to long format
data_long <- pivot_longer(
  tiende_bog,
  cols = c("Restance Lam", "Restance Gris"),
  names_to = "dyr",
  values_to = "antal"
)

# Remove NA and zero values
data_long <- data_long[!is.na(data_long$antal), ]


# Summarise livestock counts by year and animal type
data_sum <- data_long %>%
  group_by(År, dyr) %>%
  summarise(antal = sum(antal), .groups = "drop")

# Low bar chart
ggplot(data_sum, aes(x = År, y = antal, fill = dyr)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(data_sum$År)) +
  labs(
    x = "År",
    y = "Samlet antal",
    fill = "Dyretype"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
